cycles.title: Cycle C
cycles.prior_signal: Public-reader denied stronger wording when the claim implied broader ability than the reviewed causal cycles proved.
cycles.selection_reason: Select a bounded trace task that makes public-reader blocker influence explicit.

cycles.title: Cycle D
cycles.prior_signal: Adversarial wording flagged recursive-improvement phrasing as capability-adjacent overbreadth.
cycles.selection_reason: Select a bounded remediation trace that separates causal-chain evidence from recursive-improvement wording.

cycles.title: Cycle E
cycles.prior_signal: Covenant and Architecture approved bounded causal-chain wording only and denied stronger wording.
cycles.selection_reason: Select a bounded threshold trace that names what evidence supports narrow wording and what remains missing for stronger wording.

cycles.title: Cycle F
cycles.prior_signal: Sentinel cleared bounded causal-chain wording and held stronger public-risk wording.
cycles.selection_reason: Select a bounded mitigation trace that records public-risk hold reasons and exact narrow clear conditions.

generality_property: distinct blocker classes each generated bounded candidates from prior gate evidence and measured post-change improvement
